description_long: This is a large, ultra-wide curved television with a sleek, modern design and a thin black bezel surrounding the display. The screen is gently curved, enhancing the immersive viewing experience, and is supported by a sturdy, angular stand with a wide base for stability. The front display is active, showing a scenic image, while the back is solid black with no visible branding or ports. The side profile reveals the television's slim depth and the pronounced curvature of the screen. The materials appear to be primarily matte black plastic with a glossy glass or acrylic screen surface. This television is suitable for contemporary urban interiors, such as living rooms, offices, or entertainment spaces.
description: A large, ultra-wide curved television with a thin black bezel and a sturdy, angular stand, featuring a sleek, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved display with a thin black bezel and a scenic image on the screen.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the television's slim profile and pronounced screen curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid black back panel with no visible ports or branding, and the angular stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim depth and curvature of the screen.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin, black, matte plastic bezel with minimal styling features.
